---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new behaviour, a new widget, or a CLI affordance.
title: "feat: <short summary>"
labels: ["feature", "triage"]
---

## Problem

What is the user-visible problem that motivates this request? Avoid
proposing a solution before describing the pain.

## Proposed shape

If you already have a sketch — config schema, CLI flag, widget contract,
gate ID — outline it here. Cite the spec section the change would extend
or amend (§N.M).

## Alternatives considered

What else did you weigh? Why is this shape preferable?

## Compatibility

- [ ] Backwards-compatible config schema
- [ ] Adds a new widget role / theme palette key
- [ ] Adds a new CLI subcommand or flag
- [ ] Touches a §1.2 budget (cold-start, render, memory)
- [ ] Touches the published-tarball file list

## Out of scope

What this request explicitly does not include, so reviewers can scope it.
